Hey, I'm Pedro Beirão
Software Engineer
Projects
dsda-doom
One of the most important modern Doom source ports
dsda-launcher
A launcher GUI for dsda-doom
dsdarchive
Website that hosts Doom's speedrunning scene
pyopenglDoom
Doom renderer using PyOpenGL. An exercise on the anatomy of .wad
mindcuber-python
A program that solved a Rubik's cube with a ev3 Mindstorms, without needing a SD card
Jet Set Billy
A recreation of the cult classic game for the ZX Spectrum, Jet Set Willy
My Name is Jeff
A game about two Robot brothers that take on challenges together
Void Pursuit
2D spaceship shooting game
Non Stop Dude
Retro style platformer where you can't stop running
ICL Discord Bot
Hosted in the official SuperbossGames Discord server, this is the bot that handles intruder competitive tournaments
Balloon Race
ThreeJS experimentation scene of a two player balloon race
IGN Search Engine
A search engine (with semantic search capabilities) for the IGN review database
esnake
Project that aims to port the classic Snake game to many platforms for learning purposes
Blinq
2 player board game where the objective is to connect both side of your color/symbol, written in prolog
Blockade
Blockade running in an Arduino with a graphics display

Some other projects that I don't currently have a way to display neatly like the ones above:
Intruder Map Recovery
Scripts and tools to recover Intruder maps made with older Unity version, and port them to make them playable again
dsda related scripts
Some scripts I made and distributed to be used in dsda related purposes, as well as the one off builds
Unity Playground
My personal playground project to test/show Unity stuff
Other OSS
I would like to find a way to include some open source projects I've contributed to, tbf it's mostly Doom related :P
FAIR
FAIRification of a Commercial Aircraft Accidents dataset
LLM Quantization
A comprehensive research project evaluating the impact of quantization on LLM energy consumption, inference latency, and accuracy using standardized benchmarks
Thesis
Building an editor for the IEC-61499 standard
